label: DE.CM-06
definition: External service provider activities and services are monitored to find potentially adverse events

label: GV.SC-07
definition: The risks posed by a supplier, their products and services, and other third parties are understood, recorded, prioritized, assessed, responded to, and monitored over the course of the relationship

label: GV.SC-09
definition: Supply chain security practices are integrated into cybersecurity and enterprise risk management programs, and their performance is monitored throughout the technology product and service life cycle
